author: Tharusha Madushan
text:
Today, I called this number to buy a 17 Pro Max. Before coming, I asked all the details including the price and whether the phone was in stock. I asked twice if I could purchase it today if I came to the shop.

The person I spoke to clearly confirmed that the X/A version in orange colour was available. They also confirmed the price as 4.30 lakhs.

After confirming everything, I went to the shop around 11 AM, dropping some of my important work, because I trusted the name Rifkhan’s iDealz.

However, only after I arrived, they checked the stock and told me that the phone was not available. This is completely unacceptable. I did not go there to waste my time based on false information.

Is it fair for staff to mislead customers like this and make them come all the way for nothing? I was extremely disappointed and frustrated.

I do not recommend the Bambalapitiya branch at all. The staff there are not reliable. I don’t know about the other branches, but what happened here was a very unpleasant experience.

If the management is seeing this, please ensure that customers’ valuable time is not wasted by giving false information.

Completely disappointed.
owner_reply:
Response from the owner 2 weeks ago
Dear Tharusha,

We would like to clarify a few points to avoid any misunderstanding. During the phone conversation, there was no confirmation that you would be visiting the showroom immediately to purchase the device. The inquiry mainly related to pricing and trade-in value for your existing iPhone.At the time, the iPhone 17 Pro Max X/A SIM version in Orange was discussed, and when you visited iDeal Prime branch, that specific variant was unavailable. However, this was clearly communicated at the showroom, and our team offered you the eSIM version, which was available at a more budget-friendly price.Additionally, our staff informed you that the requested X/A SIM version could be arranged within approximately two days, with the understanding that the price may vary depending on availability.We strive to be transparent with our customers and do not intentionally provide misleading information. Nevertheless, we regret the inconvenience caused and appreciate your feedback, as it helps us improve communication and service clarity.

Team iDealz

author: shifa Yoosuf
text:
Outstanding service & truly trustworthy experience

I had an amazing experience with this IDealz, especially thanks to Ubaidhullah. I was abroad at the time and wanted to surprise my nephew with an iPad , and honestly I was a bit nervous about arranging everything from another country. But Ubaidhullah made the entire process smooth, stress-free, and trustworthy from start to finish.

He was extremely patient, responsive, and clear in communication. He helped me choose the right ipad & kept me updated at every step, and most importantly, he personally made sure the iPad  was delivered safely as a surprise exactly as I wanted. The way he handled everything showed true professionalism and genuine care for customers.

It’s very rare to find someone who goes the extra mile without being asked, and Ubaidhullah did exactly that. My nephew was overjoyed, and the surprise was a complete success — all because of his dedication and honesty.

I highly recommend idealz to anyone looking for reliable service, and a special thanks again to Ubaidhullah for his outstanding support. Definitely one of the best customer service experiences I’ve had. Keep up the great work!

author: Vaishali Sivarajalingam
text:
Worst experience I ever had
I have pre ordered a IPhone 17 pro max 1TB when they advertised at Rs 585,000 , and promised to give within 2-3 days
They informed no need to pay advance
But when I called back in 3 days, they said the order is not available yet and will inform me the next day
But there were no response
So I was keep calling every single day to check whether it is available, but they didn’t even answer the call
Then I went to check whether it is available , they told me stock not yet available
Then I called them 1 week from the day of pre order, they told me i can get the stock at the price of 610,000
What is the point of pre order?
Worst customer care
Worst experience I ever had

author: Ananthraj Rajendran
text:
Do not buy Green Lion tempered glass.
20 days ago, I purchased the Green Lion 4-in-1 Defender Pack for my iPhone 17 Pro for 10,000/=. Initially, the price they said was 15,000/= but after I mentioned that their Liberty Plaza store was said it for 10,000/=, they agreed to match the price.

The main issue is the poor quality of the tempered glass included in the package. A very minor impact like a small key accidentally dropping on the screen caused the tempered glass to shatter. Idealz is charging premium prices for very low quality accessories, which is unfair and disappointing. I would not recommend green lion tempered glass based on my experience.

For those who wants to protect their new iphone I strongly recommend to go for ESR products which is available from Future world and Xclusive.

author: mahiru Kotelawala
text:
I had the most amazing experience at IDealz Lanka Prime Branch . From the moment I walked in, I was greeted with a warm smile and attentive service. The staff Nuskey is incredibly knowledgeable and went out of their way to ensure I was finding the perfect phone for my needs. They took the time to explain all the features and even showed me how to set up my new device.

What really impressed me was their honesty—they didn’t try to upsell me anything I didn’t need. Instead, they offered great advice on the best options within my budget. The entire process was smooth and stress-free, and I felt completely taken care of.

Plus, their after-purchase support is excellent! They made sure I knew how to reach them if I had any questions after leaving the store. It's rare to find such personalized and attentive customer service these days.

I’ll definitely be coming back for all my future phone needs and recommending this place to everyone I know. Truly a 5-star experience!

author: Channa Weerasena
text:
Bought an Apple MacBook Pro 14 Inches M3  on the 05th of February.  They gave us a handwritten invoice for that Rs. 439,000.00 product and didn't even provide a bag for us to bring it.

After switching on the MacBook, it said, "The warranty Expired".  When I contacted the store, they gave me the contact number of Apple Support Singapore and asked to call them to get the Apple Care warranty.  Once I called them, they asked me to submit the invoice, which I did. But they couldn't authorise it because it was a handwritten one. After I called the shop again, Ishan, who was the service manager at that time, gave me attitude and said they needed more time, which I gave plenty.  After 7 days, when I contacted Ishan, he agreed to give us the Idealz warranty for 365 days and agreed to provide us a proper invoice as well. But we didn't get that letter till today even after 1 month and 2 weeks.

When I called today,  Ishan was not there, and the people who were there knew nothing.  The new sales manager talked with me, Ilham, and agreed to send the invoice, and he did.

We had a bad experience at Idealz and we decided not to buy anything from them again.

Ilham was good with customer care and after sales.

I personally don't recommend this place to buy any Apple product though the new Service manage Ilham seems to be nice. It's our hard earned money, after all. The Idealz company must care about the products that they are selling and about the customers.

author: Life's a Journey
text:
I was considering purchasing a mobile device from this store. Initially, their responses were fairly timely, even with some minor delays. However, when I reached out to confirm stock availability and finalize the purchase, they suddenly stopped responding, despite my messages being seen.

This was quite unexpected, as I would have anticipated more engagement and assistance at the final stage of the buying process. Instead, the lack of response led me to take my business elsewhere.

I hope the store addresses this issue to ensure that both current and future customers receive a more reliable and professional service experience.

author: Nimasha Sewwandi
text:
My Honest Experience at Idealz Lanka - Marina Mall

I recently visited the Idealz Lanka store at Marina Mall to purchase a phone, and the sales representative Abdul Rahman was very approachable and helpful.

I purchased my Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra for LKR 271,240. However I experienced strong pressure to buy additional accessories. Initially Abdul Rahman quoted LKR 30,000 for a tempered glass screen protector, wireless earbuds, a phone back cover, and a charging adapter. When I declined he reduced the price to LKR 20,000 for just the tempered glass, earbuds, and charger.

While I appreciated Abdul Rahman's assistance, I would advise future customers to be cautious. There seems to be a push to upsell accessories at inflated prices, which can feel uncomfortable. If you're only looking to buy a phone, be firm in your decision and consider checking prices elsewhere before purchasing accessories from this store.

author: Shachini Karunarathna
text:
I recently bought an iPhone 16 Pro from idealz, and overall, my experience was a mix of positive and disappointing aspects.

On the positive side, the phone price was comparatively lower than other places, which was a great deal. The salesperson was friendly and professional, and the service was very quick. I’ve also bought my previous iPhone from here, and it’s still working perfectly—so I can confidently say their phones are genuine and of good quality.

However, I was quite disappointed with the accessories pricing. They recommended a 4-in-1 Green Lion pack (which included a back cover, lens cover, and tempered glass) for LKR 18,000. I was told it was the best option, and I bought it without doing any market research. Later, I found the exact same pack being sold at Liberty Plaza for just LKR 5,900. That’s a huge price difference and left me feeling taken advantage of.

It seems like they keep the phone prices low but recover profit through overpriced accessories. So, my advice: the shop is reliable for phones, but I’d recommend buying accessories separately from another store after checking prices.

text: Good product and  can recommend it. But be aware on their package deals such as Phone deals with accessaries coz I have experienced it.When I bought my phone (03rd phone from IDealz) they have given me a phone screen guard, Back cover and a back sticker, camera protection (4 in 1) for a package deal and when I requested them to paste the back sticker for my phone they keep on saying it doesn’t look nice and the appearance is not good after pasting it but I really wanted to paste it coz it’s a protection but they refused it by saying the same thing and ask me to come after 02,03 months then they will do it. Actually I visited their same branch very recently to get it done. But again another story they said it’ll effect for the phone coz of the heating system.  Then I said fine and went for an another reputed phone shop to get it done. Then only I have realized the reality that sticker is not sticky at all. And I don’t think even that product founder can paste it. So why they are doing that kind of cheap things to their loyal customers.Actually their products are better than their competitors. *And they have good customer base so they need to be honest to them in deed*. Thank you.

author: Shri Daran
text:
I bought the phone and it was already unsealed and they pasted another new sticker on top of the original seal sticker pretended as it’s a unsealed brand-new and it sold it. I really doubt whether their phones are very authentic. The customer service is not great. They often tell lies to sell accessories, claiming there are package deals and free gifts that you don't actually get. Also, be careful with their installment plans. What they say on the website might not be true. Before you buy on installments, check with your bank first. They might tell you to buy first and then call to convert to installments later.

When I called them, they said the phones come from Dubai, and they didn't know about the unsealed packaging.

I really don't recommend buying Phones & accessories from this shop.

text:

When I connected the AirPods to the phone, I was able to note that the warranty period of the AirPod had elapsed by one month. It seems they activated the warranty earlier. However, it was not a big issue for me, and I decided to purchase it. The item seems to be an original Apple AirPod 02. The sound quality is superb.

Price was in the middle range, compared to other shops.

Further, they cost an additional 3% when you purchase using a Credit Card.

author: Imesha I
text:
I ordered an iPhone 12 with them on Monday afternoon, received the parcel on Tuesday before noon.
It was very easy to place an order with them even though the covid situation in country.
Comparing the available other market prices, iDealz definitely gives the best offers. So I received a good offer by placing the order via WhatsApp (online ordering) for the mobile phone and other things bought. Received a 1yr warranty as well.
Flexible pay methods are available, you can communicate about it with them to your liking.

Everything was delivered safely & fast (before 24hrs) to my home. The customer service & communication is clear and excellent!

Highly satisfied & recommended.

author: Nimasha Sewwandi
text:
My Honest Experience at Idealz Lanka - Marina Mall

I recently visited the Idealz Lanka store at Marina Mall to purchase a phone, and the sales representative Abdul Rahman was very approachable and helpful.

I purchased my Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra for LKR 271,240. However I experienced strong pressure to buy additional accessories. Initially Abdul Rahman quoted LKR 30,000 for a tempered glass screen protector, wireless earbuds, a phone back cover, and a charging adapter. When I declined he reduced the price to LKR 20,000 for just the tempered glass, earbuds, and charger.

While I appreciated Abdul Rahman's assistance, I would advise future customers to be cautious. There seems to be a push to upsell accessories at inflated prices, which can feel uncomfortable. If you're only looking to buy a phone, be firm in your decision and consider checking prices elsewhere before purchasing accessories from this store.

I recently visited Idealz and I had an outstanding experience! The staff was incredibly knowledgeable and helpful, answering all my questions about various smartphones and accessories. They took the time to understand my needs and suggested the perfect phone for me.

The store had a great selection of phones, from budget options to the latest models. I appreciated their transparent pricing and the assistance with plan options that fit my budget.

The ambiance of the shop was welcoming, making my shopping experience enjoyable. I also loved how they handled the checkout process, which was quick and efficient.

I highly recommend Idealz to anyone looking for a new phone or tech accessories. Thank you for the excellent service!

Thank you Furkhan

author: Shachini Karunarathna
text:
I recently bought an iPhone 16 Pro from idealz, and overall, my experience was a mix of positive and disappointing aspects.

On the positive side, the phone price was comparatively lower than other places, which was a great deal. The salesperson was friendly and professional, and the service was very quick. I’ve also bought my previous iPhone from here, and it’s still working perfectly—so I can confidently say their phones are genuine and of good quality.

However, I was quite disappointed with the accessories pricing. They recommended a 4-in-1 Green Lion pack (which included a back cover, lens cover, and tempered glass) for LKR 18,000. I was told it was the best option, and I bought it without doing any market research. Later, I found the exact same pack being sold at Liberty Plaza for just LKR 5,900. That’s a huge price difference and left me feeling taken advantage of.

It seems like they keep the phone prices low but recover profit through overpriced accessories. So, my advice: the shop is reliable for phones, but I’d recommend buying accessories separately from another store after checking prices.

author: Kashmira Pathirana
text: Good product and  can recommend it. But be aware on their package deals such as Phone deals with accessaries coz I have experienced it.When I bought my phone (03rd phone from IDealz) they have given me a phone screen guard, Back cover and a back sticker, camera protection (4 in 1) for a package deal and when I requested them to paste the back sticker for my phone they keep on saying it doesn’t look nice and the appearance is not good after pasting it but I really wanted to paste it coz it’s a protection but they refused it by saying the same thing and ask me to come after 02,03 months then they will do it. Actually I visited their same branch very recently to get it done. But again another story they said it’ll effect for the phone coz of the heating system.  Then I said fine and went for an another reputed phone shop to get it done. Then only I have realized the reality that sticker is not sticky at all. And I don’t think even that product founder can paste it. So why they are doing that kind of cheap things to their loyal customers.Actually their products are better than their competitors. *And they have good customer base so they need to be honest to them in deed*. author: Shri Daran
text:
I bought the phone and it was already unsealed and they pasted another new sticker on top of the original seal sticker pretended as it’s a unsealed brand-new and it sold it. I really doubt whether their phones are very authentic. The customer service is not great. They often tell lies to sell accessories, claiming there are package deals and free gifts that you don't actually get. Also, be careful with their installment plans. What they say on the website might not be true. Before you buy on installments, check with your bank first. They might tell you to buy first and then call to convert to installments later.

When I called them, they said the phones come from Dubai, and they didn't know about the unsealed packaging.

I really don't recommend buying Phones & accessories from this shop.

However, it was not a big issue for me, and I decided to purchase it. The item seems to be an original Apple AirPod 02. The sound quality is superb.

Price was in the middle range, compared to other shops.

Further, they cost an additional 3% when you purchase using a Credit Card.
